title: Spacer's Lounge
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Spacer's Lounge''' was a bar located in [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was destroyed along with the rest of the port during the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|Fall of Coruscant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
